MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-03-2013 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND ALISA REAGAN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/26/13 IS CONTINUED TO 11/12/13 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE BASED ON SCHEDULE CONFLICTS OF COUNSEL. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED EXCEPT FOR THE SUPPLEMENTAL MEDICAL AND PSYCHOLOGICAL RECORDS OF THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE WRITTEN ORDER PENDING TO BE SUBMITTED REGARDING THE COURT'S RULING ON THIS MOTION MUST BE APPROVED AS TO FORM BY OPPOSING COUNSEL. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M.
